name: Emergency Response Support System
source_name: Emergency Response Support System, Government of India
confidence_reasons: Single number for police, fire, health, and disaster response
notes: Dial 112 for any emergency. Connects to police, fire, ambulance, and disaster response.

name: National Ambulance Service (108)
confidence_reasons: EMRI 108 service operational in Karnataka and 18+ Indian states
notes: Free emergency ambulance. Operational in Karnataka and most Indian states.

name: Police Emergency (100)
notes: Dial 100 for police emergency anywhere in India.

name: Karnataka Fire and Emergency Services (101)
source_name: Karnataka Fire and Emergency Services Official Website
confidence_reasons: Karnataka Fire and Emergency Services official website
notes: Dial 101 for fire emergency anywhere in India.

name: NHAI National Highway Helpline (1033)
source_name: National Highways Authority of India (NHAI) Official Website
confidence_reasons: Provides towing, breakdown, and accident assistance on national highways
notes: Dial 1033 for NHAI highway helpline. Towing, breakdown, and accident assistance on national highways.
